ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "query_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading data query */,
  "assumedLPToken" REAL /* Assumed liquidity provider token balance */,
  "equityValue" REAL /* Equity value of the trading position */,
  "totalDexYield" REAL /* Total yield from the decentralized exchange */,
  "totalTradingfee" REAL /* Total trading fee collected */,
  "newTotalTradingFee" REAL /* New total trading fee after adjustments */,
  "liquidity" REAL /* Liquidity in the trading pool */,
  "totalVolume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades in the current period */,
  "priceImpact" REAL /* Price impact of trades */,
  "priceEffect" REAL /* Effect of trades on price */,
  "totalReturn" REAL /* Total return on investment */,
  "totalEquityVal" REAL /* Total equity value */,
  "impermanentLoss" REAL /* Impermanent loss incurred */,
  "tokenPrice" REAL /* Price of the token */,
  "quoteTokenPrice" REAL /* Price of the quote token */,
  "rewardPrice" REAL /* Price of the reward token */,
  "rewardTokenPerLP" REAL /* Reward tokens per liquidity provider token */,
  "feePerDollar" REAL /* Fee per dollar of trading volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, swap) */,
  "trade_amount" REAL /* Amount of the token traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Difference between expected and actual price of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_ts"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES user_trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee entry */,
  "query_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading data query */,
  "totalTradingfee" REAL /* Total trading fee collected */,
  "newTotalTradingFee" REAL /* New total trading fee after adjustments */,
  "feePerDollar" REAL /* Fee per dollar of trading volume */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is denominated */,
  "fee_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the fee is applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_query_ts FOREIGN KEY ("query_ts") REFERENCES trading_data ("query_ts"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES user_trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liquidity_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liquidity pool */,
  "tokenName" TEXT /* Name of the token in the liquidity pool */,
  "quoteTokenName" TEXT /* Name of the quote token in the liquidity pool */,
  "liquidity" REAL /* Total liquidity in the pool */,
  "tokenPrice" REAL /* Price of the token */,
  "quoteTokenPrice" REAL /* Price of the quote token */,
  "pool_apy" REAL /* Annual percentage yield of the liquidity pool */,
  "total_volume_24h" INTEGER /* Total trading volume in the last 24 hours */,
  "total_fees_24h" REAL /* Total fees collected in the last 24 hours */,
  "pool_status" TEXT /* Status of the liquidity pool (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_liquidity_pools_tokenName FOREIGN KEY ("tokenName") REFERENCES token_prices ("tokenName")
)

CREATE TABLE "token_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "tokenName" TEXT /* Name of the token */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the token */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the token */,
  "volume_24h" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the token in the last 24 hours */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in the price of the token in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward entry */,
  "tokenName" TEXT /* Name of the reward token */,
  "rewardPrice" REAL /* Price of the reward token */,
  "rewardTokenPerLP" REAL /* Reward tokens per liquidity provider token */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reward distribution */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., liquidity mining, staking) */,
  "reward_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the reward is valid */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_tokenName FOREIGN KEY ("tokenName") REFERENCES token_prices ("tokenName")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, investor, admin) */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current balance in the user's account */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed by the user */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the user */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return on investment for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "query_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading data query */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "priceImpact" REAL /* Price impact of the trade */,
  "priceEffect" REAL /* Effect of the trade on price */,
  "totalReturn" REAL /* Total return on the trade */,
  "impermanentLoss" REAL /* Impermanent loss incurred from the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, swap) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Difference between expected and actual price of the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_trades_query_ts FOREIGN KEY ("query_ts") REFERENCES trading_data ("query_ts")
)
